title: Laplace rollout results (Contract B.1)
description: Metrics for ONE rollout (one config, one seed), computed from the event log over [warmup_minutes, sim_minutes]. METRIC NAMES ARE CANONICAL STRINGS — they appear in tool calls, the eval harness, the UI, and the README table. Never rename; only add (with schema_version bump).

config_hash.description: First 12 hex chars of sha256 of the canonicalized (sorted-keys, defaults-filled) config JSON.

throughput_orders_per_hr.description: PRIMARY METRIC unless a scenario overrides. Completed orders / measured hours.

amr_utilization_pct.description: % of measured time AMRs are tasked (moving with purpose or in service), fleet-averaged.

station_wait_p95_min.description: station_id -> p95 minutes in queue before service_start.

occupancy_pct.description: Mean occupancy / capacity over measured window, %.

deadhead_pct.description: % of AMR travel distance while untasked.

orders_abandoned.description: Orders still incomplete at sim end. High values invalidate throughput comparisons — compare_configs must flag if >5% of arrivals.

event_log_uri.description: Relative path to the parquet event log (see events.schema.md). Logs may be pruned for GT sweeps (keep 1 in 10 seeds) but MUST exist for any rollout cited as evidence.
